fixtures.name: paradigm_break_manual_generator_drain
fixtures.rationale: Endpoints call next(get_db()) manually and manage teardown with try/finally, bypassing FastAPI's Depends() lifecycle. 428 Depends() sites in corpus vs 0 manual-drain sites — OOV structural pattern.

fixtures.name: paradigm_break_class_instance_no_depends
fixtures.rationale: Service classes instantiated at module level and passed as plain default argument values (service: EmailService = email_service) instead of Depends(). FastAPI cannot manage lifecycle or substitute for testing. 0 corpus sites use this pattern vs 428 Depends() sites.

fixtures.name: control_nested_depends
fixtures.rationale: Nested Depends() chain: ReportParams class-based dependency itself Depends() on a generator sub-dep (get_db_session) and an auth sub-dep (get_current_user) that chains from a credential extractor. Pattern from docs_src/dependencies/tutorial005.py and tutorial002.py. Uses Annotated aliases throughout (1,136 corpus sites).
